item.title: RatInABox-Lab/RatInABox
item.description: A python package for simulating movement and spatial cell types (e.g. place cells, grid cells) in continuous environments.

item.title: bnnr-team/bnnr
item.description: XAI-driven augmentation & diagnostics for PyTorch vision - find model failures, fix with saliency-guided augmentation (ICD/AICD), prove with auditable reports.

item.title: OHBA-analysis/osl-ephys
item.description: Electrophysiological Data Analysis Toolbox.

item.title: neural-bit/EEG-Viewer
item.description: An interactive MATLAB application for efficient visualization and exploration of multichannel EEG recordings.

item.title: sync2brain/bossdevice-api-matlab
item.description: sync2brain's bossdevice RESEARCH Application Programmable Interface (API) for MATLAB

item.title: janelia-flyem/dvid
item.description: Distributed, Versioned, Image-oriented Dataservice

item.title: C4rr13rX/W1z4rDV1510n
item.description: A distributed intelligence node that learns to physically describe its environment — not by classification, but by growing structure from what it observes. CPU and RAM native. No GPUs required.

item.title: Neuromorphicism/fly-brain-snntorch
item.description: Sparse snnTorch implementation of Fruit Fly (Drosophila Melanogaster) Brain

item.title: nbara/python-meegkit
item.description: 🔧🧠 MEEGkit: MEG & EEG processing toolkit in Python

item.title: google-research/zapbench
item.description: The Zebrafish Activity Prediction Benchmark measures progress on the problem of predicting cellular-resolution neural activity throughout an entire vertebrate brain.

item.title: KirillHit/twl_spike_yolo
item.description: TWL Spike Yolo is a spiking neural network (SNN) for object detection with event-based cameras

item.title: AxonOS-BCI/axonos-community-radar
item.description: AxonOS Radar — a living, auto-updated map of the open brain-computer-interface field. An AxonOS community project.

item.title: keras-team/keras
item.description: Deep Learning for humans

item.title: deepfakes/faceswap
item.description: Deepfakes Software For All

item.title: rordenlab/dcm2niix
item.description: dcm2nii DICOM to NIfTI converter: compiled versions available from NITRC

item.title: NeuromatchAcademy/course-content
item.description: NMA Computational Neuroscience course

item.title: psychopy/psychopy
item.description: For running psychology and neuroscience experiments

item.title: fooof-tools/fooof
item.description: Parameterizing neural power spectra into periodic & aperiodic components.

item.title: NVlabs/instant-ngp
item.description: Instant neural graphics primitives: lightning fast NeRF and more

item.title: analyticalmonk/awesome-neuroscience
item.description: A curated list of awesome neuroscience libraries, software and any content related to the domain.

item.title: PerlinWarp/pyomyo
item.description: PyoMyo - Python Opensource Myo armband library

item.title: labmlai/annotated_deep_learning_paper_implementations
item.description: 🧑‍🏫 60+ Implementations/tutorials of deep learning papers with side-by-side notes 📝; including transformers (original, xl, switch, feedback, vit, ...), optimizers (adam, adabelief, sophia, ...), gans(cyclegan, stylegan2, ...), 🎮 reinforceme

item.title: Verified-Intelligence/alpha-beta-CROWN
item.description: alpha-beta-CROWN: An Efficient, Scalable and GPU Accelerated Neural Network Verifier (winner of VNN-COMP 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025)

item.title: bee-san/Ciphey
item.description: ⚡ Automatically decrypt encryptions without knowing the key or cipher, decode encodings, and crack hashes ⚡

item.title: brainglobe/cellfinder
item.description: Automated 3D cell detection in very large images
